g.text: Atur siapa boleh apa di bimbel · 5 role · 4 sistem + 1 kustom
12 anggota · teacher · sesi, presensi, materi, laporan
28 anggota · parent · lihat progres + pembayaran anak

Container: AppShell · 256+1024 · 64px topbar gradient · Poppins · dark night #0B0E1A · cyan accent
tidak tersedia untuk role tipe teacher
Same component tree as the school mockup — only the RbacPalette factory swaps to .tutoring() (dark night + cyan accent).
Implementation note: at the Vue layer, dark theme is one CSS class on AppShell — the per-component styles already use brand tokens (#21AFE6 in tutoring vs #143068 in school).
